Issuer: Tambuli Foods Holdings, Inc.; Buyer: Bahaghari Capital Partners OPC; Contact: Ms. Lira D. Valdez (CFO), l.valdez@tambulifoods.example.ph, Unit 1509 Raya Tower, Kapihan St., Brgy. Lilim, Metro Balete 1108; +63 2 88xx 4400.
Proposed Transaction: Subscription to 320,000,000 primary common shares and purchase of 30,000,000 secondary shares from Mr. Ernesto C. Lagdameo (founder), at PHP 3.65/share; code name: Project Tarsier.
Listing Status: Issuer is listed on the main board of the local stock exchange; additional listing approval required for the primary shares.
Disclosure Status: Non-public term sheet; information herein is material and subject to a current report (Form 17-C) and E D G E portal posting within ten (10) minutes of Board approval; until then, treat as MNPI and circulate on a need-to-know basis only.
Public References (not MNPI): The Issuer’s Form 17-Q filed on 14 Aug 2025 and press release dated 02 Jan 2025 re: “SariSariPay” pilot are already public and not part of this MNPI assessment (see https://edge.eqx.ph/17Q/2025-08-14?id=Q2-25).
Funding Mechanics: Buyer to wire PHP 1,188,500,000 to Banco Tagalog de Oriente (BTO) Acct No. 00-4x7-9x1-****, SWIFT: B T O P H M N; interim escrow at Lualhati Trust Co., ref inv: https://pay.btag.or.ph/inv?id=9x3-ZA.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals; additional listing approval; no restraining order; transaction not a mandatory tender offer trigger (stake below 35% threshold under SRC Rule 19); the absence of a material adverse change is not a condition to Closing.
Selective Disclosure & Blackout: Selective disclosure is prohibited; insiders to be recorded on an OIC-maintained list; trading blackout from five (5) trading days before the Q3 17-Q cut-off until two (2) trading days after public disclosure.
Regulatory Timing: Signing targeted on or before 18 Sept 2025; filing of Form 17-C and E D G E posting within one (1) trading day if Board approval occurs outside trading hours, else within ten (10) minutes of such approval.
Covenants Pre-Closing: Ordinary course only; no dividends; no new long-term debt > PHP 100,000,000; note: Kubo Logistics OPC (non-issuer affiliate) warehouse move next month is operational and irrelevant to this transaction.
hr note: update travel policy to include “TamarawFlex” per last year’s public handbook; routine internal policy, not transaction-related and not material to investors.
Tax & Contact Details: Buyer TIN: 4 7 9-***-**3 (fictional); BIR c o r r e s p o n d e n c e via ap.team@bahaghari-cap.example.ph; payor address: 18 Cirrus Park, Brgy. Ilang-Ilang, San Isagani City 1600.
Binding Effect & Law: This term sheet is non-binding except Confidentiality and Exclusivity; governing law: Republic of the Philippines; venue: courts of Tagumpay City.
